_comment: KB-2 HBP 2022 — Neurosurgery. Merged from 4 batches. 111 procedures.

packages.package_name: Malignant Spinal Cord compression with Diagnostics, palliative radiotherapy, Brace in advanced cancer patients

preauth.label: Clinical notes with planned line of treatment

claim.label: Discharge summary with detail treatment & interventions

additional_information.vintage_note: Cross-specialty package — listed under both Neurosurgery (SN) and Radiation Oncology (MR) in HBP_2022_Package_Master1.xlsx. Absent from HBP-2022.pdf entirely; no tier rates exist in the PDF. Excel col I (non-authoritative) shows 15000. Excel col X (Enhancement) = Yes contradicts col Y (Med or Surg) = Surgical: billing_unit=one_time is retained per extractor logic (Surgical early-return). Both issues are Excel data quality problems — verify against NHA TMS before use.

source_refs.rates_inr: PM007A absent from HBP-2022.pdf — no tier rates available. Excel col I (non-authoritative per schema) = 15000. Verify manually.

additional_information.vintage_note: Excel col S (preauth) for SN061A reads 'Clinical notes establishing diagnosis of Trigeminal neuralgia and justification of local neurectomy with MRI / CT' — clearly copy-pasted from SN044A (RF lesioning). Excel col T (claim) similarly includes 'invoice of RF probe'. Both are wrong for Diagnostic Cerebral/Spinal Angiography. Documents faithfully extracted from source but clinically inconsistent. Verify against NHA TMS.

Excel col T (claim) reads 'Intra Operative stills; Detailed Procedure / Operative Notes; Barcode of RF probe' — copy-pasted from SN059 (RF lesioning). RF probe barcode is clinically inconsistent with Re-exploration cranial/spinal surgery. Documents faithfully extracted from source. Verify against NHA TMS.

additional_information.vintage_note: Excel col T (claim) reads 'Intra Operative stills; Detailed Procedure / Operative Notes; Barcode of RF probe' — copy-pasted from SN059 (RF lesioning). This is a per_day conservative medical management package; OT notes, intraop stills, and RF probe barcode are clinically incorrect. Documents faithfully extracted from source. Verify against NHA TMS.

source_refs.rates_inr: HBP-2022.pdf — page 133, SN063 row, stratification remarks column: Ward-2300, HDU-3630, ICU(no vent)-9350, ICU(with vent)-9900. Tier3/Tier2/Tier1 are 0 (per_day package, bed rates apply instead).

Verify against NHA TMS.
